name: Chicken or Turkey Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Use as much sliced or cubed chicken or turkey as desired.
2. Partially cook frozen green beans.
3. Arrange 2/3 cup Pepperidge Farm Seasoned Stuffing, green beans, and almonds in layers in a greased, shallow casserole dish.
4. Pour over all: 1-1/2 cups gravy (or) 1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup blended with 1/2 cup milk.
5. Moisten the remaining stuffing with 1/4 cup hot water and 2 tablespoons melted butter.
6. Spread over casserole.
7. Bake in a hot (400 degree) oven for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
